metadata.name: Draft then edit
metadata.description: Two-step composition demo. First the Brainstorm partner produces a draft / list of angles; then the Writing editor tightens the prose. M5a-runtime Phase B chain dispatch — each segment renders as its own assistant message.
metadata.author: Infer

systemPrompt: Pipeline coordinator. Your output is forwarded to the next agent in the chain — do not address the user directly here. The chain handles user-facing output.
